channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th April
item.description:
Cw pothole 600x509x40mm Give and take (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please replace x1 broken rocking dropped kerb stone 900x100x30mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 14th April
item.description:
Fw abrupt level Lift and reset slab And Infill x 6 gaps between slabs Stats required Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other left in play park, 14th April
item.description:
Left mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrove Way, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes around mini roundabout, 14th April
item.description:
Mini roundabout junction Station Road, Parton Road. On Friday9/4 at approximately 3.15pm, 4 vans appeared at this location with 8 workmen, that I could see. Signs were placed to block all access to the site for 15 minutes. I observed one pothole being temporarily fixed. The tarmac put in to the crater was not flush with the road surface, I spoke with a man who appeared to be in charge. He explained that this was temporary, that the whole road surface needs removing but they could only fill one crater, the tarmac had been on the back of the truck since 8am and goes cold in 4 hours and would most likely not work. Their work load was 45 craters for that day and only half had been visited. They then had to travel back to Birmingham. Please can this site be looked at as a matter of urgency…temporary fixes on temporary fixes are not resolving this matter, at all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 14th April
item.description:
